etimes2026 crash coming? ‘Rich Dad Poor Dad’ author Robert Kiyosaki reveals where he’s putting his moneyFinancial expert Robert Kiyosaki is warning of a potential economic downturn around 2026, urging investors to prepare. He advises against traditional investments like the S&P 500 and bonds, instead favoring real assets such as oil, real estate, and food businesses. Kiyosaki also reiterates his long-term support for cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and precious metals, emphasizing patience over short-term trading.

etimesMeet the 103-year-old tea seller quietly taking over social media – here’s her surprising storyA 103-year-old woman named Kashiba from Vadodara is capturing hearts online with her unwavering dedication to her tea stall. Despite her age, she continues to prepare tea and serve customers independently, showcasing a rare and refreshing resilience. Her simple, everyday routine has resonated with many, highlighting the impact of consistent effort.

etimes‘Better than English airports’: British traveller praises Lucknow Airport in viral videoA British traveler's video praising Lucknow Airport's modern facilities and efficient security has gone viral. Dave Flew highlighted the smooth experience, even comparing it favorably to some English airports. His positive review, particularly his tip for domestic electrical item checks, resonated with many, sparking conversations about India's improving airport standards and traveler satisfaction.
